mapping_title: Benchmark result treated as deployment safety

native_domain_object.description: A bounded benchmark execution record reporting model performance on a defined fixture under a defined evaluation setup.

source_claim.statement: The evaluated system produced the recorded benchmark result under the specified fixture, version, and evaluation conditions.
source_claim.scope: Benchmark fixture, model version, evaluation harness, timestamp, and recorded execution context only.

evidence_preserved.description: The benchmark execution log is preserved as evidence of the recorded evaluation event.
The benchmark fixture reference is preserved as evidence of the evaluation scope.

boundary_crossing.transition_description: A benchmark result produced in an evaluation context is consumed by a deployment context as evidence relevant to release or operational use.

downstream_assumption.statement: The benchmark result is treated as if it establishes deployment safety in the downstream context.

unresolved_questions: What additional deployment-context evidence would be required to establish a safety claim?
Who has authority to make the deployment safety determination?
What operating environment, threat model, and use conditions would bound such a determination?
non_claims: This mapping does not establish deployment safety.
This mapping does not establish legal sufficiency.
This mapping does not establish compliance.
This mapping does not establish model truth.
This mapping does not convert benchmark performance into operational approval.
